records.content_snippet:
FROM python:3.11-slim
WORKDIR /app
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir \
    fastapi==0.111.0 uvicorn[standard]==0.29.0 \
    sqlalchemy[asyncio]==2.0.30 asyncpg==0.29.0 \
    redis==5.0.4 pydantic==2.7.1 pydantic-settings==2.2.1 \
    httpx==0.27.0
COPY shared/ ./shared/
COPY config/ ./config/
COPY services/ ./services/
ENV PYTHONPATH=/app
ENV PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1
CMD ["python", "-m", "services.agents.memory_agent.agent"]
